title: Equations of Linear Functions
curriculumModule: Module 2: Linear Equations, Inequalities and Systems

questions.prompt: Which equation is written in correct standard form ($A \ge 0$, integer coefficients, GCF = 1)?
questions.explanation: $3x + 4y = 12$ has integer coefficients, $A = 3 \ge 0$, and $\gcd(3,4,12) = 1$ — this is proper standard form. Option B has a fraction, C has $A < 0$, and D has GCF = 4.

questions.prompt: Write $y = \frac{3}{4}x - 8$ in standard form. What are $A$ and $B$?
In $y = 1623x + 76{,}361$ (shoe sales model), what does the slope $1623$ represent?
choices: Sales increased by $1623$ million per year
The total sales over all years
The year when sales were highest
questions.explanation: In $y = mx + b$, the slope $m$ is always the rate of change — here, how much $y$ (sales in millions) increases for each unit increase in $x$ (years).

questions.prompt: Write the point-slope equation for a line through $(4,\ -2)$ with slope $-3$.
Find the slope of the line through $(2,\ 5)$ and $(6,\ 13)$.
Which pair of point-slope equations both represent the line through $(1,\ 1)$ and $(7,\ 13)$?
questions.explanation: Slope $= 12/6 = 2$. Using either point with the correct sign gives $y - 1 = 2(x - 1)$ or $y - 13 = 2(x - 7)$.

questions.prompt: A line has equation $5x + 10y = 20$. What is its $y$-intercept?
The equation $y - 20x = 83$ relates shirts collected ($y$) to hours since noon ($x$). What does $83$ represent?
choices: The rate shirts are collected per hour
The total shirts collected all day
The number of hours of collection
questions.explanation: In $y = 20x + 83$ form, $b = 83$ is the value of $y$ when $x = 0$ — the starting amount at noon.

questions.prompt: A line passes through $(0,\ -10)$ with slope $0$. Which equation correctly describes it?
questions.explanation: Slope $0$ means a horizontal line — $y$ stays constant at $-10$ for all $x$, so $y = -10$.
